title: AN ACT proposing to create a new section of the Constitution of Kentucky relating to property exempt from taxation.
subject: Aged Persons and Aging
Constitution, Ky.
County Clerks
Elections and Voting
Local Mandate
Secretary of State
Taxation
Taxation, Property

abstracts.abstract: Propose to create a new section of the Constitution of Kentucky to exempt for homeowners who are 65 years of age or older any increase in the valuation of their permanent residence that is assessed after the later of the year the homeowner turned 65 or the year the homeowner purchased the property; require the exemption to be in addition to the exemption provided in Section 170 of the Constitution of Kentucky and notwithstanding Sections 171, 172, and 174 of the Constitution of Kentucky; apply the exemption to increases in valuation that occur after the date the amendment is ratified by the voters; provide ballot language; submit to voters for ratification or rejection.

actions.description: to Elections, Const. Amendments & Intergovernmental Affairs (H)
